ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crash_details" (
  "crash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crash */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crash */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the crash */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the crash */,
  "crash_type" TEXT /* Type of crash (e.g., head-on, rear-end) */,
  "number_of_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the crash */,
  "number_of_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries in the crash */,
  "number_of_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in the crash */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the crash */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the crash */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions during the crash */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the crash occurred */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the crash occurred */,
  "crash_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the crash */,
  "crash_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the crash */,
  "crash_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crash */,
  "emergency_response_time" TEXT /* Time taken for emergency services to arrive at the scene */,
  "hospitalization_count" INTEGER /* Number of people hospitalized due to the crash */,
  "crash_location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the crash location */,
  "crash_location_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the crash location coordinates */,
  "crash_location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., intersection, highway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crash_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_registration" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year_registered" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was first registered */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the vehicle */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "vehicle_insurance_company" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "vehicle_insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "vehicle_insurance_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the insurance policy */,
  "vehicle_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last vehicle inspection */,
  "vehicle_inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last vehicle inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_registration_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the driver */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "license_issuance_date" TEXT /* Date the driver's license was issued */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the driver's license (e.g., valid, suspended) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  "license_class" TEXT /* Class of the driver's license (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "license_restrictions" TEXT /* Any restrictions on the driver's license (e.g., corrective lenses required) */,
  "driving_history" TEXT /* Summary of the driver's driving history (e.g., number of traffic violations, accidents) */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., active, suspended, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the population */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by age groups */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by ethnicity */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the population */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the population by education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "vmt_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "vmt" INTEGER /* Total vehicle miles traveled (VMT) */,
  "urban_vmt" INTEGER /* Urban VMT */,
  "rural_vmt" INTEGER /* Rural VMT */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of VMT */,
  "vmt_per_capita" REAL /* VMT per capita */,
  "vmt_growth_rate_urban" REAL /* Growth rate of urban VMT */,
  "vmt_growth_rate_rural" REAL /* Growth rate of rural VMT */,
  "vmt_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of VMT by vehicle type (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, report) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table accessed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's access session */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
